Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "
\\$claudeCmd = Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if \(\\$claudeCmd\) { Write-Host 'Found claude at:' \\$claudeCmd.Source } else { Write-Host 'claude NOT found in PATH' }
\\$savedCC = \\$env:CLAUDECODE
\\$env:CLAUDECODE = \\$null
\\$tmp = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\)
'say the word OK and nothing else' | Out-File -FilePath \\$tmp -Encoding UTF8
\\$out = Get-Content \\$tmp | & claude -p --no-session-persistence 2>&1
\\$ec = \\$LASTEXITCODE
\\$env:CLAUDECODE = \\$savedCC
Remove-Item \\$tmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Write-Host 'Exit code:' \\$ec
Write-Host 'Output:' \\$out
" 2>&1)
